title: Incredibly Fluffy Turkish Eggplant Imam Bayildi
description: A savory Turkish dish featuring emmentaler cheese, cooked in a tagine, Whole30-friendly and kid-friendly, this imam bayildi is a delicious and fluffy meal option.

ingredients.name: eggplant
ingredients.notes: peeled and sliced into 1/2 inch thick rounds

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced eggplant with salt to draw out moisture.
Let the eggplant sit for 30 minutes, then rinse and pat dry with paper towels.
In a large tagine or Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the sliced eggplant to the tagine, stirring to coat with the onion and tomato mixture.
Cover the tagine and transfer to the preheated oven, baking for 30 minutes.
Remove the tagine from the oven and top the eggplant with shredded emmentaler cheese.
Return the tagine to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
